description: Credible, real-time disaster shelter information for AI agents and people: which FEMA-tracked shelters are open right now, where they are, which take pets, and which are filling up. Sourced from FEMA's National Shelter System OpenShelters feed, honest about missing data.

tools.name: shelters_list
tools.description: List open shelters from the FEMA OpenShelters feed. Returns few or none when no disaster is active (quiet baseline); counts spike during named events. Data is reported roughly twice a day and may lag reality. Optional: where (default: 1=1), out-fields (default: *), return-geometry (default: false) (plus 2 more).

params.name: where
params.description: ArcGIS SQL filter; defaults to all open shelters. Most users filter via the higher-level flags instead.

params.name: out-fields
params.description: Comma-separated fields to return; defaults to all 22.

params.name: return-geometry
params.description: Geometry is not needed; latitude/longitude come back as attributes.

params.name: max-records
params.description: Server-side cap on rows returned per request.

params.name: format
params.description: ArcGIS response format; must stay json.
